title: Knowledge-driven Multimodal Drug Response Predictor
author: Yan, Bowei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study proposes a knowledge distillation-based multimodal drug response prediction framework (KMDRP). Its student model, utilizing only single-modal RNA data, achieves predictive performance surpassing that of models trained on complete multi-omics data, and demonstrates promising potential in guiding patient survival prognosis and individualized treatment in clinical validation.
steps_raw: This study proposes a knowledge distillation-based multimodal drug response prediction framework (KMDRP). Its student model, utilizing only single-modal RNA data, achieves predictive performance surpassing that of models trained on complete multi-omics data, and demonstrates promising potential in guiding patient survival prognosis and individualized treatment in clinical validation.
